g.text: Systems Engineer building production-grade, full-stack software
I'm a Systems Engineer with hands-on experience across the full software lifecycle — from frontend interfaces and REST/GraphQL APIs to mobile and
cloud infrastructure. I focus on writing clean, maintainable, well-tested code that actually ships.
CS fundamentals, design patterns, data structures & clean code
React, TypeScript & Next.js · Python & Node.js · Android
Expanding into applied machine learning & intelligent features
User value, iteration speed, observability & reliability
Git workflows, code review, CI/CD, testing & documentation
